entity.label: Account name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of Account name should be between 1 and 50
Account name must start with a letter and followed by alphabetic letters, digits or underscores.

entity.label: Username
entity.help: Enter the username for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of username should be between 1 and 200

entity.label: Password
entity.help: Enter the password for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of password should be between 1 and 8192

entity.label: SSL Certificate Bundle (PEM)
entity.help: Paste the full PEM-encoded certificate bundle (cert + CA chain) for verifying HTTPS connections to the Claroty CTD appliance. Leave empty to skip certificate verification.

entity.label: Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for the data input

validators.errorMsg: Input Name must start with a letter and followed by alphabetic letters, digits or underscores.
Length of input name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: Interval
entity.help: Time interval of input in seconds.

validators.errorMsg: Length of index name should be between 1 and 80.

entity.label: EMC IP
entity.help: Type the EMC IP address.

validators.errorMsg: Max length of text input is 8192

entity.label: EMC Admin Account
entity.help: Select the EMC admin account.

entity.label: Sites
entity.help:
Type specific Site-ID (e.g. 3).
For multiple Sites, use a comma (e.g. 3,5,7).
For a range of Sites, use a dash (e.g. 3-7).

validators.errorMsg: Max length of text input is 8192

entity.label: Alert Type
entity.help: Select Alert Type(s).

entity.label: Category
entity.help:
Select an Alert Category.
For all options, clear the field by clicking on the 'X' button on the right.

entity.label: Severity
entity.help: Select Alert Severity(ies).

entity.label: Status
entity.help:
Select an Alert Status.
For all options, clear the field by clicking on the 'X' button on the right.

entity.label: From Timestamp
entity.help: Type the timestamp according to this format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+timeszone, e.g. - 2022-10-01T00:00:00+05:00

validators.errorMsg: Max length of text input is 8192

entity.label: Notification Email
entity.help:
Email address(es) to be notified if an error occurs or is resolved.
For multiple emails, use a comma (e.g. admin@admin.com,adam@example.com).

validators.errorMsg: Max length of text input is 8192
